caption: A man with glasses and a tall, grey, textured wig is speaking into a microphone in a room filled with clothing and framed pictures. He wears a white shirt, a red bowtie, and white suspenders, along with black over-ear headphones. In front of him is a black microphone, and behind him is a wall of small, framed photographs and clothing displays, including a "LEE" brand sign. On-screen text overlays include a logo on the left that reads "PODCAST" beneath a stylized graphic and text on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY" followed by smaller, illegible text. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expression shifts as he speaks, moving from a neutral look to a slight smile with his mouth open. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body from the chest up.
